ac_verdicts.ac_text: Story body is complete and executable — MANIFEST.yaml exists and includes all required sections: Acceptance Criteria coverage, Non-Goals documentation, Subtasks ST-1 through ST-7, and Local Testing Plan (verification SQL)
MANIFEST.yaml header records source_db=lego_dev, source_port=5432; story callout present stating 'Do NOT query the knowledgebase DB (port 5433)'

MANIFEST includes: (a) deduplication_strategy field for artifact tables, (b) live_usage=true for context_packs and context_sessions, (c) fk_violations section documenting all FK constraints and undocumented dependencies found
MANIFEST includes verification_queries section with SQL commands, anchored table count assertion, per-table row counts, and copy-pasteable re-runnable verification SQL
